{{Quote|Incoming ships! They are entering the area near buoy B-18.|[[Outpost D-34]] to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]|<ref name="TF" />}}
The '''Aftermath of Hoth''' was a series of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] actions in the sectors surrounding the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]], immediately following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|destruction]] of the hidden [[Echo Base/Legends|Rebel base]]. Having been defeated, [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces fled their secret base in all directions, assisted by the supposedly neutral [[Mugaari]]. During this campaign, Imperial forces searched nearby [[Sector/Legends|sectors]] for fleeing Rebels, encountered various retaliatory strikes, secured their [[Space station/Legends|space installation]], and staged a counterattack against a local Rebel [[Task force/Legends|task force]].

==The Campaign==
===Patrolling jump point D-34===
{{Main|Skirmish at Outpost D-34}}

The first phase of the campaign entailed static searches of various vessels traveling through the sector around [[XQ1 Platform]] ''[[Outpost D-34]]''. Various [[Transport/Legends|freight]] and trade craft moved through the system, permitting the Mugaari opportunities to [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggle]] fleeing Rebels. [[Imperial pilot]]s discovered Rebel stowaways aboard [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|Bulk Freighter]] ''[[Onece 3]]'' and [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|Transport]] ''[[Glich]]'' as they attempted to pass through Imperially controlled space. Imperial Stormtrooper Transports began a capture operation just as Rebel [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] arrived to rescue their discovered comrades. In the end, Imperial forces killed or captured all of the Rebels in their attempt to flee.

===Red Alert===
{{Main|Defense of Outpost D-34}}

[[File:Onece_shoot.jpg|thumb|left|200px|TIE Fighter ''Alpha 1'' engaging Freighter ''[[Onece group|Onece]] 3''.]]
Following the initial discovery of Rebel stowaways, intelligence gathered from the prisoners revealed Rebel intentions to mount an assault on Outpost D-34. In addition to information extracted from Rebel prisoners, members of the [[Prophets of the Dark Side|Secret Order of the Empire]] revealed that the Rebels had stolen a ''Lambda''-class shuttle, and the Order expressed their intent to capture any Rebel leadership that may be present aboard this shuttle, should it arrive in the system. As expected, an enemy attack force consisting of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]], [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]], and [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] arrived to lay siege to the outpost. Imperial pilots stood by with [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] and [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] to fend off the assault until the arrival of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Flanken]] aboard the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Hammer (Imperial-class)|''Hammer'']]. During the fighting, the shuttle ''[[Scutz]]'' arrived just as expected; Imperial Gunboats quickly intervened, disabling it for capture. To the Empire's surprise, three [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] arrived to join the battle just as capture operations of ''Scutz'' began. Despite the efforts of the combined Rebel and Mugaari attack, Imperial forces held Outpost D-34 with the assistance of the Imperial Star Destroyer ''Hammer''.

===Counter attack===
{{Main|Battle of the Tungra sector}}
After fending off the impending attack on D-34, Admiral Flanken ordered a counterattack on a Rebel and Mugaari cargo loading depot in the [[Tungra sector/Legends|Tungra sector]]. [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Vistore]], aboard the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B Frigate]] ''[[Fogger]]'', oversaw the task of destroying the depot. The ''Fogger'' began the assault on the enemy base by launching four flight groups of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]], covered by one flight group of [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE interceptors]]. The enemy depot consisted of [[Cargo container/Legends|cargo containers]], [[Cargo ferry|cargo ferries]], transports, shuttles, and Y-wing fighters, and was easily destroyed by [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] fired from Imperial TIE Bombers. The Imperial surprise attack resulted in the successful destruction of the enemy depot, encountering little resistance from the aging fighters and shuttles.

===Outpost D-34 falls===
{{Main|Recapture of Outpost D-34}}
[[File:Tb_fogger.jpg|thumb|right|200px|TIE Bombers returning to frigate ''[[Fogger]]''.]]
While Imperial forces attacked the supply depot, Rebel forces succeeded in capturing Outpost D-34, forcing Imperial pilots into yet another sortie. Before the battle, agents of the Secret Order advised that [[Spy/Legends|spies]] may be among loyal Imperial forces, and expressed the need to capture additional Rebel prisoners. The frigate ''Fogger'' yet again led an assault against the Alliance force, consisting of transports, TIE Bombers, and TIE Interceptors. The Rebels attempted to counter the Imperial onslaught with X-wings, [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]], Y-wings, the new [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|Escort Shuttle]], and transports of their own. Imperial forces again succeeded in repelling the enemy starships, and recaptured their station; moreover, the Secret Order gained additional prisoners from the capture of the [[Container transport|Container Transport]] ''[[Gopher]]''.

===Attacking a Rebel light cruiser===
{{Main|Battle of the Bruanii sector}}
After regaining control of Outpost D-34, Admiral Flanken traced the trail of the attacking Rebel forces back to the [[Bruanii sector/Legends|Bruanii sector]]. Flanken ordered Colonel Vistore to send his Assault Gunboats to rally with his own and assault the Rebel stronghold in a two-phase attack. Before the assault on the Rebel forces, Secret Order agents became curious about the source of all the Imperial equipment that was emerging from Rebel hands, and tasked the Imperial pilots to be on the lookout for additional stolen arms.

Five flight groups of Imperial Gunboats emerged from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] to find the [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|Calamari Cruiser]] [[Lulsla (MC40a light cruiser)|''Lulsla'']], her compliment of fighters, and Rebel transports laying a [[Space mine/Legends|minefield]]. The Assault Gunboats began the initial task of softening up the cruiser's complement of starfighters, prior to additional forces arriving to destroy the cruiser itself. During the engagement, Imperial pilots did discover Imperial weapons located in one of the cargo containers near the ''Lulsla''. As Gunboats from groups [[Tau]], [[Rho]], [[Pi]], [[Nu]], and [[Mu]] succeeded in clearing out enemy fighters, they escaped into hyperspace just as transports and additional Gunboats arrived for the second wave against the Cruiser.
[[File:Lulsla_dogfight.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Imperial Assault Gunboats dogfighting with Rebel X-wings near Cruiser [[Lulsla (MC40a light cruiser)|''Lulsla'']].]]

===Destroy the ''Lulsla''===
The transports [[Sigma]] and [[Omega]] began their attack on the cruiser, flanked by three groups of Assault Gunboats. The Gunboats swiftly moved to destroy incoming enemy fighters and the newly-laid [[Mine Type B|Type B]] and [[Mine Type C|C]] minefield. However, the ''Lulsla'' still held a respectable resistance with its remaining X-wing, Y-wing, and A-wing fighters. Secret Order agents had forecast the inevitable doom of the cruiser, warning that its officers and crew would flee the damaged vessel before its ultimate destruction. Just as expected, starship groups ''[[Starway]]'', [[Gargon (Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport)|''Gargon'']], and ''[[Derris]]'' emerged from the Lulsla's hangar right before it exploded under fire from Imperial transports and their [[Proton rocket/Legends|proton rockets]]. Imperial Gunboats diverted from the fighting to eliminate the fleeing Rebels, sparing only their commander aboard the shuttle ''Derris'', which was later captured by Transport ''[[Zack 1]]''.

==The aftermath==
The Empire finally succeeded in pacifying the local sectors surrounding the Hoth system following the invasion. Imperial pilots played a key role in its success, appropriating valuable intelligence and capturing Rebel forces, speeding the accomplishment of the campaign. As impressive as this accomplishment was, it was also the beginning of Admiral [[Harkov]]'s defection to the Alliance.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
